summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of Coaching LMS (VidyaPath). All 17 backend pytest cases passed (auth, dashboards with exact seeded counts 3/8/32/128/64/32/3, role-based test answer hiding, MCQ scoring, cascade delete, self-enroll, live-class status). Frontend flows verified end-to-end: login (demo buttons), student dashboard, batches->batch->subject->chapter->videos (YouTube embed + playlist), MCQ test flow with result page showing per-question breakdown + explanations, admin dashboard stat cards (all correct numbers), admin batches CRUD via dialog (create+delete), admin Test Editor saving new MCQ test, live-classes page with YouTube embed.
critical_code_review_comments: Auth cookie set with samesite='none' + secure=true; works only over HTTPS (preview is HTTPS so OK). For local dev this would break cookie-based auth — frontend correctly falls back to Bearer token from localStorage, which is the active path.
/api/tests/submit does not require enrollment in the parent batch — any authenticated user can submit any test. Consider adding enrollment check.
Test attempt response leaks correct_index/explanation regardless of role (intentional for result page, but worth noting).
server.py is ~927 lines; consider splitting into routers/models/seed modules for maintainability.
/api/auth/me uses response_model=UserPublic but also sets cookie/HttpOnly logic elsewhere — fine, but created_at is Optional while seed always sets it (consider non-Optional).
Seed `if await db.batches.count_documents({}) > 0: return` means content seed is skipped after any single batch insert (including failed test data). Cleanup-friendly but worth knowing.
test_credentials: admin@lms.com / admin123, student@lms.com / student123 (matches /app/backend/.env). NOTE: /app/memory/test_credentials.md is empty — main agent should populate it.
seed_data_creation: Seed runs automatically on backend startup (3 batches, 8 subjects, 32 chapters, 128 videos, 64 notes, 32 tests, 3 live classes, 1 student enrolled in all 3 batches).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_lms_api.py — run with `pytest backend/tests/test_lms_api.py -v`. Live classes route is /live-classes (not /live). Test result URL pattern is /tests/:testId/result. Test data uses TEST_ prefix and is cleaned in fixtures. /app/memory/test_credentials.md is empty — populate it for future agents.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs encountered. One observation: console shows two 401 errors on /login page load — these are from initial /api/auth/me probe (expected when not authenticated) and are not user-facing issues.
